goal: Keep the generated wiki compact by identifying weak leaflets, merge candidates, and third-page consolidation opportunities before new pages multiply.

hard_failures: Missing locale suffix on human-facing wiki markdown
Missing source provenance or related-link block on non-index pages
Missing en/ru locale mirror for a canonical page id
No navigation item or graph inbound edge for a non-index page
reported_candidates: Short pages below the configured body-line threshold
Low-confidence pages below the configured confidence threshold
Graph leaves with no outbound edge

completed_consolidations.rationale: Short audience leaflet overlapped with DEOS in 60 Seconds, Partner Pitch, and Forking DEOS. Its audience bullets now live in the compact 60-second entry page, while aliases route audience queries to the stronger owner page.
Route-only page overlapped with Partner Pitch and Reading Paths. Its five-page evaluation route now lives inside Partner Pitch, while aliases route evaluation queries to that owner page.

Low-confidence graph clustering showed the fork checklist as an adjacent weak page inside the forking neighborhood. Its table now lives in Forking DEOS, while aliases route fork-profile queries to that owner page.

Low-confidence graph clustering showed Threat Model and Invariant Map as one assurance neighborhood. Threat rows now live in the strengthened Invariant and Threat Map, while risk/threat aliases route to that owner page.

Low-confidence graph clustering showed the DAO treasury comparison and Executive Summary as one partner-positioning neighborhood. The comparison now lives inside Executive Summary, while treasury-comparison aliases route to that owner page.

compression_candidates.pressure: Assurance pages explain adjacent validation, claim, invariant, and failure-mode concepts.
compression_candidates.candidate_action: Threat Model has been merged into Invariant Map; next consider whether Economic Claim Levels should stay separate as the claim taxonomy or become a section of the assurance map.

compression_candidates.pressure: Multiple first-contact pages still compete for the same newcomer attention span after the first leaflet deletion.
compression_candidates.candidate_action: Keep DEOS in 60 Seconds as the hook, keep Executive Summary as the partner due-diligence summary with the DAO-treasury contrast embedded, and avoid re-splitting route/comparison leaflets out of owner pages.

strengthened_pages.rationale: These standalone navigation pages retain distinct scope. Their explanations now preserve launch-state and activation boundaries without inventing automatic wakeups or overstating deployed behavior.

deferred: Do not delete additional pages without updating navigation, graph, aliases, localized mirrors, and all inbound links in one pass.
Do not convert useful comparison or matrix pages into prose-only summaries just to reduce page count.
